<!-- PART 2: WORKFLOW REFERENCE — do not edit -->
## Workflow Reference

All agent definitions, skills, and rules live in `.ai/` — the single source of truth.
For complete workflow documentation: @.claude/full_workflow.md

### Agents
| Agent | File | Model |
|-------|------|-------|
| Strategist | `.ai/agents/strategist.md` | opus |
| Architect | `.ai/agents/architect.md` | opus |
| Tester | `.ai/agents/tester.md` | sonnet |
| Implementor | `.ai/agents/implementor.md` | haiku |
| Verifier | `.ai/agents/verifier.md` | sonnet |
| Debugger | `.ai/agents/debugger.md` | opus |

### Skills
| Skill | File |
|-------|------|
| Workflow | `.ai/skills/workflow/SKILL.md` |
| Discuss | `.ai/skills/discuss/SKILL.md` |
| Investigate | `.ai/skills/investigate/SKILL.md` |
| Wiki | `.ai/skills/wiki/SKILL.md` |
| UI Spec | `.ai/skills/ui-spec/SKILL.md` |
| GitNexus (auto-installed) | `.claude/skills/gitnexus/` |
| Playwright (auto-installed) | `.claude/skills/dev/` |

### Active Task State
```
.ai/active/current/   ← currently running task
.ai/active/paused/    ← interrupted by bug fix, waiting to resume
```

### Key Files
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------| 
| `ROADMAP.md` | Milestones & macro status |
| `REQUIREMENTS.md` | Feature backlog |
| `.ai/active/current/SPEC.md` | Feature contract (current task) |
| `.ai/active/current/DESIGN.md` | UI design system (current task, if UI in scope) |
| `.ai/active/current/PLAN.md` | Execution waves (current task) |
| `.ai/active/current/STATE.md` | Live progress (current task) |
<!-- END PART 2 -->
